mission: Make DreamCo the in-house A-to-Z foundry for building, testing, packaging, hosting, and deploying games, websites, apps, school courses, simulations, dashboards, creative media, and business bot systems.
ownership_rule: DreamCo-owned repository code is the source of truth. External clouds, static hosts, payment processors, email providers, and domain services are deployment targets or adapters, not the builder of record.

creation_lanes.label: Games
creation_lanes.description: Prompt-to-playable prototypes with game design docs, levels, scoring, controls, saves, and test scenes.
creation_lanes.sandbox_bootcamp: gameplay loop, controls, collision, scoring, save-state, level progression, and accessibility checks

creation_lanes.label: Websites
creation_lanes.description: Client-ready websites, landing pages, portals, documentation hubs, and product showcases.
creation_lanes.sandbox_bootcamp: responsive layout, forms, accessibility, SEO metadata, link integrity, and static deployment checks

creation_lanes.label: Apps
creation_lanes.description: Full app builds with screens, local-first data, auth adapters, API adapters, tests, and rollback notes.
creation_lanes.sandbox_bootcamp: auth mocks, CRUD flows, error states, API contracts, migration rehearsal, and rollback simulation

creation_lanes.label: School courses
creation_lanes.description: Age-appropriate course generators for lessons, quizzes, assignments, rubrics, teacher notes, and student-safe media plans.
creation_lanes.sandbox_bootcamp: learning objectives, grade fit, quiz validation, source notes, accessibility, and content safety checks

creation_lanes.label: Simulations
creation_lanes.description: Business, science, finance, operations, robotics, real estate, and training simulations with adjustable variables.
creation_lanes.sandbox_bootcamp: determinism, bounds, sensitivity checks, invalid input handling, replay logs, and explainable outputs

creation_lanes.label: Dashboards
creation_lanes.description: Operational command centers, prospectus pages, bot dashboards, KPI trackers, and client demo rooms.
creation_lanes.sandbox_bootcamp: empty states, stale data flags, loading failures, report contract tests, and role-safe views

creation_lanes.label: Creative media
creation_lanes.description: Music video packets, image editing workflows, brand kits, storyboards, audio plans, and asset-rights ledgers.
creation_lanes.sandbox_bootcamp: rights review, consent proof, prompt provenance, caption checks, and no deceptive likeness use

creation_lanes.label: Business bots
creation_lanes.description: Client business workers for sales, support, booking, estimating, CRM updates, lead capture, and delivery workflows.
creation_lanes.sandbox_bootcamp: tool permissions, API mocks, webhook replay, client data redaction, revenue-risk checks, and rollback drill

deployment_targets.label: GitHub Pages
deployment_targets.role: Free static previews for dashboards, websites, courses, simple games, and static simulations.

deployment_targets.label: Hostinger
deployment_targets.role: Starter public hosting target for Buddy dashboard builds and client demos.

deployment_targets.label: Local laptop
deployment_targets.role: Development, demos, sandbox runs, and owner-supervised builds before public deployment.

deployment_targets.label: Static host
deployment_targets.role: Portable static deploy bundle for CDN-style hosts.

deployment_targets.label: Managed Node host
deployment_targets.role: Node or API-backed apps after secrets, auth, observability, and rollback gates are configured.

deployment_targets.label: Container host
deployment_targets.role: Full-stack apps, bot services, schedulers, and API workers that need a runtime beyond static hosting.

static_preview_rules: Every lane must produce a previewable artifact before any live deployment.
GitHub Pages can host static dashboards, courses, docs, games, websites, and simple simulations.
Apps that require backend secrets must use static mock mode until a governed API host is connected.
next_build_targets: Create one prompt-to-preview wizard for all eight lanes.
Add deployment manifests per lane with static, Node, and container modes.
Add rollback/checkpoint records for generated app builds.
Add client prospectus pages that explain what each built artifact does, costs, risks, and test proof.
Add per-lane eval loops that rerun after every generated change.
